violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Multiple raw animal proteins stored comingled. Recommend storing according to cook temperatures in walk in cooler.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple food items not date marked in establishment. Ensure foods held for longer than 24 hours are properly date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Rice cookers, food buckets, line cooler, and line cooking equipment have buildup of food debris and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Area around line cooking equipment has a buildup of grease and food debris and needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have an accumulation of food debris in walk in cooler, under/around cooking line equipment, and need cleaning.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
